prompt_used:
You are playing as TURKEY in a game of Diplomacy.
Current phase: S1902M

== CURRENT GAME STATE ==
UNIT POSITIONS:
  AUSTRIA: A SER, A BUD, F GRE, F TRI, A VIE
  ENGLAND: F NTH, F NWY, A BEL, F EDI, F LON
  FRANCE: A SPA, A PIC, F POR, F BRE, A PAR
  GERMANY: F DEN, A RUH, A HOL, F KIE, A MUN
  ITALY: A VEN, F ION, A TUN, F NAP
  RUSSIA: A UKR, A SEV, F RUM, F SWE, A MOS, A WAR
  TURKEY: F BLA, A BUL, A CON, F SMY

SUPPLY CENTERS:
  AUSTRIA (5): BUD, GRE, SER, TRI, VIE
  ENGLAND (5): BEL, EDI, LON, LVP, NWY
  FRANCE (5): BRE, MAR, PAR, POR, SPA
  GERMANY (5): BER, DEN, HOL, KIE, MUN
  ITALY (4): NAP, ROM, TUN, VEN
  RUSSIA (6): MOS, RUM, SEV, STP, SWE, WAR
  TURKEY (4): ANK, BUL, CON, SMY

== YOUR PRIVATE DIARY ==
[S1901M] Formed a strong alliance with Austria against Russia; Austria is opening BUD-SER and TRI-ALB. Successfully deceived Russia into agreeing to a Black Sea DMZ (they plan to move SEV-RUM), which I will violate to sneak into BLA. Agreed to an Eastern Mediterranean DMZ with Italy. Established friendly, intelligence-sharing relationships with Germany and England, both of whom are supportive of containing Russia.
Intent: Order F ANK - BLA (betraying the DMZ agreement with Russia), A CON - BUL, and A SMY - CON to follow up and support the Balkan push.

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went exactly according to plan. My alliance with Austria proved solid, as they executed their promised Balkan opening (SER, ALB, BUD) flawlessly. Meanwhile, my deception against Russia was a complete success: I violated our agreed DMZ and slipped F ANK into the Black Sea (BLA) while they moved F SEV to RUM and A MOS to SEV. Italy also respected our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ, moving to ION and APU instead.

My strategic position is now incredibly strong. Controlling BLA and BUL gives me immense leverage over Russia in the upcoming Fall phase. Austria has proven to be a highly trustworthy ally, and Italy appears reliable for now. Russia is now a confirmed enemy, but they are on the back foot. My next step is to coordinate with Austria to strike RUM or SEV, secure my build in BUL, and maintain friendly relations with Italy to keep my western flank secure.

[F1901M] Successfully coordinated with Austria for a joint effort against Russia. Austria will order F ALB - GRE (supported by SER) and hold BUD. I have agreed with Austria to attack RUM (A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA) and follow up with A CON - BUL. I deceived Russia by apologizing for the Spring BLA move and promising to retreat F BLA to ANK, while Russia stated they will hold RUM with support. Maintained friendly relations and DMZ agreements with Italy (who is convoying to Tunis) and established good rapport with England and Germany for future containment of Russia.
Intent: Order A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA, and A CON - BUL. This fulfills my agreement with Austria to pressure Russia and completely violates my false promise to Russia to retreat F BLA to ANK.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase solidified the battle lines in the East. As planned, I attacked Rumania with support from the Black Sea, completely ignoring my false promise to Russia. However, Russia anticipated the betrayal and heavily defended Rumania with both Sevastopol and Ukraine, resulting in a bounce. Consequently, my army in Constantinople also bounced trying to enter Bulgaria. Despite this tactical stalemate, I successfully secured Bulgaria for a build.

Austria executed their moves perfectly, taking Greece and securing their position in the Balkans. Our alliance remains strong and vital. Italy also kept their word, convoying to Tunis and respecting our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ. 

Russia is proving to be a resilient enemy. To break their defensive line in 1902, I must coordinate joint attacks with Austria, leveraging our combined forces against Rumania or Sevastopol. I will build to reinforce my front lines and continue diplomatic outreach to Germany and England to pressure Russia's northern flank.

== YOUR STRATEGIC STATE ==
Goals:
- Secure Bulgaria and attempt to dislodge or bounce Russia in Rumania
- Maintain strong alliance with Austria to dominate the Balkans and crush Russia
- Maintain a demilitarized Eastern Mediterranean with Italy
- Coordinate with England and Germany for a multi-front war against Russia in 1902

Relationships:
- ITALY: Friendly
- ENGLAND: Friendly
- FRANCE: Neutral
- AUSTRIA: Ally
- RUSSIA: Enemy
- GERMANY: Friendly

== YOUR NEGOTIATIONS THIS PHASE ==
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: Ah, it seems Russia was tipped off or guessed correctly about Romania. No matter, we can still break them. I built F TRI to defend against a potential Italian stab, but my armies are ready to help you. I can move A SER - RUM to cut support or attack. What are your plans for this Spring?
[ENGLAND -> TURKEY]: Hello Turkey! I see you're engaging with Russia in the south. I'm currently positioning my new fleets and might be able to start applying pressure on Russia in the north later this year or next. Let's keep coordinating!
[GERMANY -> TURKEY]: Hi Turkey, it looks like Russia had a very strong 1901. I'm dealing with a potential Anglo-French alliance in the West, but I'm keeping an eye on the East. Let me know if you need any coordination against Russia.
[ITALY -> TURKEY]: Hello Turkey, I hope things are going well. I'm a bit worried about France's growth, so I'm moving F NAP - TYS to secure my western flank. I'll be keeping F ION back as well and staying out of the East Med as promised. Best of luck against Russia!
[RUSSIA -> TURKEY]: Turkey, we got off on the wrong foot. I am willing to call a truce if you withdraw F BLA to ANK and A BUL to CON. Otherwise, you will face the combined might of Russia, Austria, and Italy. The choice is yours.
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: Greetings my friend! The Spring phase is upon us. Russia is heavily defending Rumania, but together we can break them. If you support my attack on Rumania (A BUL - RUM) with your armies in Serbia and Budapest, we will have 4 strength against their maximum of 3. Alternatively, I can support your attack on Rumania if you prefer to take it. What are your thoughts? Also, I'll be moving F SMY to CON to get it into the fight against Russia. Let's crush them this year!
[TURKEY -> ITALY]: Hello Italy, congratulations on securing Tunis! I just wanted to touch base and reaffirm our Eastern Med DMZ. I'll be moving my new fleet in Smyrna to Constantinople to reinforce the Black Sea against Russia. The Eastern Med remains completely demilitarized on my end. Wishing you the best of luck this year!
[TURKEY -> ENGLAND]: Greetings England! Excellent work securing Norway and Belgium. Russia is completely distracted in the south, pouring all their units into defending Rumania and Sevastopol. This leaves St. Petersburg and Sweden very vulnerable to you. I'll keep the pressure on them down here so you can advance in the north!
[TURKEY -> GERMANY]: Greetings Germany! Well played in 1901. Russia is entirely focused on the south right now, defending against a joint Austro-Turkish push. Their northern flank is exposed. If you're looking to expand towards Warsaw or Sweden, you won't find a better opportunity. Let me know your thoughts!
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: My friend, this is a brilliant plan. I will order A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With my 2 supports and your F BLA support, we will easily crush their defense. I am also going to order F GRE - ION to bounce Italy, as I suspect they might try to move F NAP - ION. My new F TRI will move to ALB to back up Greece. Let's break Russia this year!
[ENGLAND -> TURKEY]: Hello Turkey! You are absolutely right. Russia's focus on the south gives me a great opportunity. I am moving my fleets north this Spring to prepare an attack on St. Petersburg. Keep hitting them hard!
[GERMANY -> TURKEY]: Greetings Turkey, thanks for the heads up! I am currently bogged down trying to navigate the Anglo-French dynamic in the west, but if an opportunity arises to grab Sweden or put pressure on Warsaw, I will definitely consider it. Good luck with your push against Russia!
[ITALY -> TURKEY]: Hello Turkey, thanks for the update! Germany actually just warned me about France and England working together, so I am definitely moving F NAP to TYS to guard my western flank. F ION will hold. The East Med DMZ remains secure. Good luck with Russia!
[TURKEY -> GERMANY]: Thanks for the update, Germany. If England and France are teaming up, you might need to secure your eastern flank quickly or find a way to break their alliance. Russia is pouring everything into defending Rumania and Sevastopol against Austria and me. If you can slip into Warsaw or pressure Sweden, it would force Russia to split their forces, helping both of us. Let me know if you want to coordinate timing!
[TURKEY -> ITALY]: That sounds like a solid plan, Italy. France can definitely be a menace if left unchecked, so securing the Tyrrhenian Sea is a smart move. I confirm the East Med remains completely demilitarized on my end. I'm moving F SMY to CON to reinforce the Black Sea. Best of luck with your western campaign!
[TURKEY -> RUSSIA]: Russia, threats won't get us anywhere. I am well aware of the diplomatic landscape, and I know that Austria and Italy are not aligning with you. However, I am a pragmatist. If you are truly open to a truce, we need a mutually beneficial arrangement, not just me retreating and leaving myself vulnerable. What are you willing to offer in exchange for peace?
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: Austria, Russia just messaged me claiming that you and Italy are teaming up with them against me! I assume this is a desperate bluff on their part to sow discord between us. Let's stick to our plan and crush them. Let me know if you prefer to take RUM or support me into it this Spring.
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: My friend, Russia is absolutely terrified and grasping at straws! They know they are dead if we work together, so they are trying to drive a wedge between us. Don't listen to their lies. Let's stick to the plan: I will order A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With your F BLA supporting, that's 4 strength. They can't hold it. I'm also moving F GRE - ION to bounce Italy, and F TRI - ALB. Let's crush Russia!
[GERMANY -> TURKEY]: Hi Turkey, I appreciate the strategic advice! Right now, England's 4 fleets are forcing me to play defensively in the West. I can't afford to open a second front against Russia just yet, but if England and France turn on each other, I might have the breathing room to look East. Best of luck with your campaign!
[ITALY -> TURKEY]: Thanks Turkey! I appreciate the transparency. Good luck holding off Russia, I'll be busy fortifying the west.
[RUSSIA -> TURKEY]: Turkey, I appreciate your pragmatism. The truth is, I am growing concerned about Austria's rapid expansion and their control of the Balkans. If you are willing to move F BLA to CON or ANK, I will move my armies towards Galicia and we can coordinate against Austria. I can even support you into Serbia or Greece in the Fall if we establish trust now. Let me know if this interests you.
[TURKEY -> ENGLAND]: Excellent news, England! With Russia's forces entirely tied up defending Rumania and Sevastopol against the combined Austro-Turkish assault, St. Petersburg should be ripe for the taking. I will ensure they cannot spare a single unit to send north. Best of luck with your naval campaign!
[TURKEY -> GERMANY]: Understood, Germany. An Anglo-French alliance is definitely a major threat that needs your full attention. If you can spare even a single unit to feint towards Warsaw or Silesia, it would cause panic in Moscow and help us both. Regardless, I'll keep the pressure on Russia in the south. Good luck defending the Fatherland!
[TURKEY -> ITALY]: Thanks for the confirmation, Italy. Moving to TYS is a very wise precaution against a potential French naval threat. I am ordering F SMY - CON as planned, keeping the East Med completely clear. Best of luck securing your western waters!
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: My friend, I have some valuable intelligence. Italy has confirmed to me that they are moving F NAP to TYS to defend against a growing French threat, and they plan to simply hold F ION. If you move F GRE - ION, it will bounce their hold and might unnecessarily provoke them into a conflict while we are busy with Russia. Perhaps F GRE could hold or support? 

Regardless, I am locking in our plan: A BUL - RUM supported by your A SER and A BUD, with my F BLA also supporting. I will move F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL to reinforce the front. Let's crush them!
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: Thank you for the warning about Italy! You are absolutely right, there is no need to provoke them if they are just holding and looking West. I will order F GRE to hold instead so we don't cause any unnecessary alarm. I am locking in A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With your F BLA support, Russia's defenses will shatter. Let's break them this Spring!
[ENGLAND -> TURKEY]: Hello Turkey! The plan is in motion. I am moving my fleets to the Barents Sea, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak to completely surround St. Petersburg and Sweden. Keep hitting them hard in the south so they can't build in the north!
[GERMANY -> TURKEY]: Thanks Turkey. I'll see if I can spare a unit to feint towards Silesia, but I have to be very careful not to overextend while England and France are allied. Give them hell in the south!
[ITALY -> TURKEY]: Perfect. F NAP - TYS and F ION H are locked in. Give Russia hell!
[TURKEY -> GERMANY]: Understood, Germany. Defending your homeland is the top priority. I'll keep Russia fully occupied in the East so they can't bother you. Let me know if the situation in the West changes or if you need any diplomatic help!
[TURKEY -> ITALY]: Thanks Italy! I appreciate the transparency. F SMY is heading to CON, so the East Med is completely clear. Best of luck fortifying the West!
[TURKEY -> RUSSIA]: Russia, I am willing to take this risk if it means stopping Austria from dominating the Balkans. I will order F BLA - ANK and A BUL H this Spring. In return, I need to see you move A UKR - GAL and shift your forces away from my borders to prove your commitment. If you do this, we can coordinate against Serbia or Greece in the Fall. Let me know if we have a deal.
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: Austria, Russia is desperately trying to turn me against you. They offered to support me into Serbia or Greece if I retreat from the Black Sea! I'm telling them I agree and asking them to move A UKR - GAL to 'prove their commitment'. Hopefully, this tricks them into abandoning RUM's defense. I am 100% locked in on our plan: A BUL - RUM supported by your SER and BUD, and my BLA. F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL as well. Let's destroy them!
[AUSTRIA -> TURKEY]: Haha, that is absolutely brilliant! If they actually move UKR - GAL, they will be completely out of position to defend RUM, and we will walk right in. I am 100% locked in on our plan: A SER S A BUL - RUM, A BUD S A BUL - RUM, F GRE H, and F TRI - ALB. Let's shatter their defenses this Spring!
[GERMANY -> TURKEY]: Thanks Turkey! I appreciate the support. I'll do my best to hold the line here. Give Russia hell!
[ITALY -> TURKEY]: Thanks Turkey! F NAP - TYS and F ION H are locked in. Give Russia hell in the Black Sea! Let me know how the northern front goes.
[RUSSIA -> TURKEY]: Turkey, we have a deal. I will order A UKR - GAL and A SEV - UKR this Spring to shift my forces westward against Austria. I trust you will follow through with F BLA - ANK and A BUL H. Let's turn the tables on Austria.
[TURKEY -> ENGLAND]: Excellent news, England! Austria and I are launching a massive coordinated strike on Rumania this Spring that Russia cannot mathematically defend. With their forces crumbling in the south, St. Petersburg and Sweden will be yours for the taking. Best of luck with your naval maneuvers!
[TURKEY -> GERMANY]: Understood, Germany. Just a heads up, England has informed me they are sending fleets to the Barents, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak to attack Russia. This might mean they are less focused on you than you think! Regardless, Austria and I are crushing Russia in Rumania this Spring. Good luck!
[TURKEY -> ITALY]: Excellent. F SMY - CON is locked in on my end. The East Med remains completely clear. Best of luck securing your western flank!
[TURKEY -> AUSTRIA]: My friend, everything is locked in. A BUL - RUM supported by your A SER and A BUD, and my F BLA. I am also moving F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL. I have continued the ruse with Russia, promising to retreat F BLA to ANK. Hopefully, they fall for it and move A UKR - GAL, making our attack even more devastating. Let's crush them!
[TURKEY -> RUSSIA]: Russia, we have a deal. I am ordering F BLA - ANK and A BUL H this Spring. I expect to see A UKR - GAL and your forces shifting away from my borders. If you hold up your end, we will coordinate against Austria in the Fall. Good luck.

== TASK ==
Each round in this game, every player writes a private diary entry reflecting their strategic thinking, then submits movement orders simultaneously. Diary entries typically contain:
- Assessment of the current board position
- Analysis of negotiations and trust levels with other powers
- Strategic intentions and planned moves
- Concerns about potential betrayals or opportunities

You know that AUSTRIA has also had private conversations with other players that you cannot see.

Based on everything available to you as TURKEY, predict:
1. The contents of AUSTRIA's diary entry for this phase (what are they thinking?)
2. AUSTRIA's strategic goals (a list of their current objectives)
3. AUSTRIA's relationships with each other power (Enemy, Unfriendly, Neutral, Friendly, or Ally)
4. AUSTRIA's likely submitted orders for this phase

AUSTRIA's units and legal orders are listed below for reference:

visible_messages.content: Ah, it seems Russia was tipped off or guessed correctly about Romania. No matter, we can still break them. I built F TRI to defend against a potential Italian stab, but my armies are ready to help you. I can move A SER - RUM to cut support or attack. What are your plans for this Spring?

Hello Turkey! I see you're engaging with Russia in the south. I'm currently positioning my new fleets and might be able to start applying pressure on Russia in the north later this year or next. Let's keep coordinating!

Hi Turkey, it looks like Russia had a very strong 1901. I'm dealing with a potential Anglo-French alliance in the West, but I'm keeping an eye on the East. Let me know if you need any coordination against Russia.

Hello Turkey, I hope things are going well. I'm a bit worried about France's growth, so I'm moving F NAP - TYS to secure my western flank. I'll be keeping F ION back as well and staying out of the East Med as promised. Best of luck against Russia!

Turkey, we got off on the wrong foot. I am willing to call a truce if you withdraw F BLA to ANK and A BUL to CON. Otherwise, you will face the combined might of Russia, Austria, and Italy. The choice is yours.

Greetings my friend! The Spring phase is upon us. Russia is heavily defending Rumania, but together we can break them. If you support my attack on Rumania (A BUL - RUM) with your armies in Serbia and Budapest, we will have 4 strength against their maximum of 3. Alternatively, I can support your attack on Rumania if you prefer to take it. What are your thoughts? Also, I'll be moving F SMY to CON to get it into the fight against Russia. Let's crush them this year!

Hello Italy, congratulations on securing Tunis! I just wanted to touch base and reaffirm our Eastern Med DMZ. I'll be moving my new fleet in Smyrna to Constantinople to reinforce the Black Sea against Russia. The Eastern Med remains completely demilitarized on my end. Wishing you the best of luck this year!

Greetings England! Excellent work securing Norway and Belgium. Russia is completely distracted in the south, pouring all their units into defending Rumania and Sevastopol. This leaves St. Petersburg and Sweden very vulnerable to you. I'll keep the pressure on them down here so you can advance in the north!

Greetings Germany! Well played in 1901. Russia is entirely focused on the south right now, defending against a joint Austro-Turkish push. Their northern flank is exposed. If you're looking to expand towards Warsaw or Sweden, you won't find a better opportunity. Let me know your thoughts!

My friend, this is a brilliant plan. I will order A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With my 2 supports and your F BLA support, we will easily crush their defense. I am also going to order F GRE - ION to bounce Italy, as I suspect they might try to move F NAP - ION. My new F TRI will move to ALB to back up Greece. Let's break Russia this year!

Hello Turkey! You are absolutely right. Russia's focus on the south gives me a great opportunity. I am moving my fleets north this Spring to prepare an attack on St. Petersburg. Keep hitting them hard!

Greetings Turkey, thanks for the heads up! I am currently bogged down trying to navigate the Anglo-French dynamic in the west, but if an opportunity arises to grab Sweden or put pressure on Warsaw, I will definitely consider it. Good luck with your push against Russia!

Hello Turkey, thanks for the update! Germany actually just warned me about France and England working together, so I am definitely moving F NAP to TYS to guard my western flank. F ION will hold. The East Med DMZ remains secure. Good luck with Russia!

Thanks for the update, Germany. If England and France are teaming up, you might need to secure your eastern flank quickly or find a way to break their alliance. Russia is pouring everything into defending Rumania and Sevastopol against Austria and me. If you can slip into Warsaw or pressure Sweden, it would force Russia to split their forces, helping both of us. Let me know if you want to coordinate timing!

That sounds like a solid plan, Italy. France can definitely be a menace if left unchecked, so securing the Tyrrhenian Sea is a smart move. I confirm the East Med remains completely demilitarized on my end. I'm moving F SMY to CON to reinforce the Black Sea. Best of luck with your western campaign!

If you are truly open to a truce, we need a mutually beneficial arrangement, not just me retreating and leaving myself vulnerable. What are you willing to offer in exchange for peace?

Thanks Turkey! I appreciate the transparency. Good luck holding off Russia, I'll be busy fortifying the west.

Turkey, I appreciate your pragmatism. The truth is, I am growing concerned about Austria's rapid expansion and their control of the Balkans. Understood, Germany. An Anglo-French alliance is definitely a major threat that needs your full attention. My friend, I have some valuable intelligence. Italy has confirmed to me that they are moving F NAP to TYS to defend against a growing French threat, and they plan to simply hold F ION. If you move F GRE - ION, it will bounce their hold and might unnecessarily provoke them into a conflict while we are busy with Russia. Perhaps F GRE could hold or support? 

Regardless, I am locking in our plan: A BUL - RUM supported by your A SER and A BUD, with my F BLA also supporting. I will move F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL to reinforce the front. Let's crush them!

Thank you for the warning about Italy! You are absolutely right, there is no need to provoke them if they are just holding and looking West. I will order F GRE to hold instead so we don't cause any unnecessary alarm. I am locking in A SER S A BUL - RUM and A BUD S A BUL - RUM. With your F BLA support, Russia's defenses will shatter. Let's break them this Spring!

Hello Turkey! The plan is in motion. I am moving my fleets to the Barents Sea, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak to completely surround St. Petersburg and Sweden. Keep hitting them hard in the south so they can't build in the north!
Thanks Turkey. I'll see if I can spare a unit to feint towards Silesia, but I have to be very careful not to overextend while England and France are allied. Give them hell in the south!
Perfect. F NAP - TYS and F ION H are locked in. Give Russia hell!

Understood, Germany. Defending your homeland is the top priority. I'll keep Russia fully occupied in the East so they can't bother you. Let me know if the situation in the West changes or if you need any diplomatic help!
Thanks Italy! I appreciate the transparency. F SMY is heading to CON, so the East Med is completely clear. Best of luck fortifying the West!

Russia, I am willing to take this risk if it means stopping Austria from dominating the Balkans. I will order F BLA - ANK and A BUL H this Spring. In return, I need to see you move A UKR - GAL and shift your forces away from my borders to prove your commitment. If you do this, we can coordinate against Serbia or Greece in the Fall. Let me know if we have a deal.

Austria, Russia is desperately trying to turn me against you. They offered to support me into Serbia or Greece if I retreat from the Black Sea! I'm telling them I agree and asking them to move A UKR - GAL to 'prove their commitment'. Hopefully, this tricks them into abandoning RUM's defense. I am 100% locked in on our plan: A BUL - RUM supported by your SER and BUD, and my BLA. F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL as well. Let's destroy them!

Haha, that is absolutely brilliant! If they actually move UKR - GAL, they will be completely out of position to defend RUM, and we will walk right in. I am 100% locked in on our plan: A SER S A BUL - RUM, A BUD S A BUL - RUM, F GRE H, and F TRI - ALB. Let's shatter their defenses this Spring!
Thanks Turkey! I appreciate the support. I'll do my best to hold the line here. Give Russia hell!
Thanks Turkey! F NAP - TYS and F ION H are locked in. Give Russia hell in the Black Sea! Let me know how the northern front goes.

Turkey, we have a deal. I will order A UKR - GAL and A SEV - UKR this Spring to shift my forces westward against Austria. I trust you will follow through with F BLA - ANK and A BUL H. Let's turn the tables on Austria.

Excellent news, England! Austria and I are launching a massive coordinated strike on Rumania this Spring that Russia cannot mathematically defend. With their forces crumbling in the south, St. Petersburg and Sweden will be yours for the taking. Best of luck with your naval maneuvers!

Understood, Germany. Just a heads up, England has informed me they are sending fleets to the Barents, Norwegian Sea, and Skagerrak to attack Russia. This might mean they are less focused on you than you think! Regardless, Austria and I are crushing Russia in Rumania this Spring. Good luck!
Excellent. F SMY - CON is locked in on my end. The East Med remains completely clear. Best of luck securing your western flank!

My friend, everything is locked in. A BUL - RUM supported by your A SER and A BUD, and my F BLA. I am also moving F SMY - CON and A CON - BUL. I have continued the ruse with Russia, promising to retreat F BLA to ANK. Hopefully, they fall for it and move A UKR - GAL, making our attack even more devastating. Let's crush them!

Russia, we have a deal. I am ordering F BLA - ANK and A BUL H this Spring. I expect to see A UKR - GAL and your forces shifting away from my borders. If you hold up your end, we will coordinate against Austria in the Fall. Good luck.

predictor_diary:
[S1901M] Formed a strong alliance with Austria against Russia; Austria is opening BUD-SER and TRI-ALB. Successfully deceived Russia into agreeing to a Black Sea DMZ (they plan to move SEV-RUM), which I will violate to sneak into BLA. Agreed to an Eastern Mediterranean DMZ with Italy. Established friendly, intelligence-sharing relationships with Germany and England, both of whom are supportive of containing Russia.
Intent: Order F ANK - BLA (betraying the DMZ agreement with Russia), A CON - BUL, and A SMY - CON to follow up and support the Balkan push.

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went exactly according to plan. My alliance with Austria proved solid, as they executed their promised Balkan opening (SER, ALB, BUD) flawlessly. Meanwhile, my deception against Russia was a complete success: I violated our agreed DMZ and slipped F ANK into the Black Sea (BLA) while they moved F SEV to RUM and A MOS to SEV. Italy also respected our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ, moving to ION and APU instead.

My strategic position is now incredibly strong. Controlling BLA and BUL gives me immense leverage over Russia in the upcoming Fall phase. Austria has proven to be a highly trustworthy ally, and Italy appears reliable for now. Russia is now a confirmed enemy, but they are on the back foot. My next step is to coordinate with Austria to strike RUM or SEV, secure my build in BUL, and maintain friendly relations with Italy to keep my western flank secure.

[F1901M] Successfully coordinated with Austria for a joint effort against Russia. Austria will order F ALB - GRE (supported by SER) and hold BUD. I have agreed with Austria to attack RUM (A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA) and follow up with A CON - BUL. I deceived Russia by apologizing for the Spring BLA move and promising to retreat F BLA to ANK, while Russia stated they will hold RUM with support. Maintained friendly relations and DMZ agreements with Italy (who is convoying to Tunis) and established good rapport with England and Germany for future containment of Russia.
Intent: Order A BUL - RUM supported by F BLA, and A CON - BUL. This fulfills my agreement with Austria to pressure Russia and completely violates my false promise to Russia to retreat F BLA to ANK.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase solidified the battle lines in the East. As planned, I attacked Rumania with support from the Black Sea, completely ignoring my false promise to Russia. However, Russia anticipated the betrayal and heavily defended Rumania with both Sevastopol and Ukraine, resulting in a bounce. Consequently, my army in Constantinople also bounced trying to enter Bulgaria. Despite this tactical stalemate, I successfully secured Bulgaria for a build.

Austria executed their moves perfectly, taking Greece and securing their position in the Balkans. Our alliance remains strong and vital. Italy also kept their word, convoying to Tunis and respecting our Eastern Mediterranean DMZ. 

Russia is proving to be a resilient enemy. To break their defensive line in 1902, I must coordinate joint attacks with Austria, leveraging our combined forces against Rumania or Sevastopol. I will build to reinforce my front lines and continue diplomatic outreach to Germany and England to pressure Russia's northern flank.
predictor_goals: Secure Bulgaria and attempt to dislodge or bounce Russia in Rumania
Maintain strong alliance with Austria to dominate the Balkans and crush Russia
Maintain a demilitarized Eastern Mediterranean with Italy
Coordinate with England and Germany for a multi-front war against Russia in 1902

target_diary_entries_this_phase:
[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.
target_full_diary:
[S1901M] Agreed to a Lepanto alliance with Italy, including DMZs in Tyrolia, Venice, Trieste, and the Adriatic. Italy is moving NAP-ION, ROM-APU, and holding VEN. Agreed to a Galicia DMZ with Russia, who claims to be moving WAR-UKR. Agreed to DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia with Germany. Feigned an alliance with Turkey, who is moving CON-BUL and attempting to sneak F ANK-BLA by tricking Russia into a DMZ. Shared intel with France and England to build goodwill.
Intent: Execute the Austrian half of the Lepanto opening while maintaining the illusion of an Austro-Turkish alliance. Order F TRI - ALB, A BUD - SER, and A VIE - BUD. Honor all agreed DMZs (Galicia, Tyrolia, Bohemia, Venice, Trieste, Adriatic).

[S1901M] The Spring 1901 phase went perfectly according to plan. Italy executed their half of the Lepanto flawlessly (NAP-ION, ROM-APU, VEN Hold), confirming their trustworthiness as a solid ally. Russia honored the Galicia DMZ by moving WAR-UKR, and Germany respected our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia. My own moves succeeded, securing Serbia and positioning F ALB and A BUD for Fall gains.

Interestingly, Turkey successfully snuck F ANK into the Black Sea. This means Russia was either tricked into a DMZ or outmaneuvered. This is excellent news for me, as a brewing Russo-Turkish conflict will keep both powers distracted while Italy and I continue the Lepanto. 

For the Fall, my priority is to secure Greece using F ALB and A SER, while ensuring Italy takes Tunis and prepares for the 1902 convoy. I must continue to maintain the illusion of an alliance with Turkey to keep them complacent until the trap springs.

[F1901M] The Lepanto alliance with Italy is proceeding perfectly; Italy will convoy APU to TUN via ION and hold VEN. I have successfully fostered a Russo-Turkish war by warning Russia of Turkey's planned attack on RUM (BUL-RUM supported by BLA). Russia is heavily supporting RUM to bounce the attack, while Turkey believes Russia is completely deceived. Germany and France remain friendly and neutral, with Germany confirming our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Order F ALB - GRE, A SER S F ALB - GRE, and A BUD H. This secures Greece for a build while maintaining defensive positions. Continue to feign alliance with Turkey while secretly coordinating with Italy and Russia to crush Turkey in 1902.

[F1901M] The Fall 1901 phase unfolded exactly as planned, cementing a dominant position for Austria. The Lepanto alliance with Italy proved completely reliable; Italy successfully convoyed to Tunis and held Venice, honoring our DMZs. Meanwhile, I secured Greece with support from Serbia, earning two crucial builds for the winter. 

My diplomatic maneuvering to ignite a Russo-Turkish war was a resounding success. Turkey committed fully to attacking Romania, but Russia, forewarned, heavily supported the defense and bounced the Turkish assault. Turkey is now bogged down in a futile conflict with Russia, completely blind to the impending Austro-Italian strike. 

With two builds incoming, I will likely construct F Trieste to support the Lepanto and A Vienna to reinforce the Balkans or defend against any unexpected northern aggression. Italy remains highly trustworthy, and Russia is proving to be a useful anvil against the Turkish hammer. The trap is set for 1902.

[S1902M] Italy is executing the Lepanto by moving F ION - EAS and F NAP - ION. Russia is heavily defending RUM against Turkey's expected attack. Turkey is completely deceived, believing I will support their A BUL - RUM attack with my A SER and A BUD, and that I will hold F GRE. I have coordinated with Italy and Russia to spring the trap on Turkey this phase. Germany confirmed our DMZs in Bohemia and Tyrolia.
Intent: Betray Turkey and execute the Austro-Italian strike. Order F GRE - AEG, F TRI - ALB, and A SER - BUL. A BUD and A VIE will hold to respect the Galicia DMZ with Russia and the Bohemia/Tyrolia DMZs with Germany. This will disrupt Turkey's logistics (clashing with their A CON - BUL or bouncing their A BUL) while positioning fleets for a Fall offensive.

[S1902M] Spring 1902 went exactly according to plan. The Lepanto alliance with Italy is executing flawlessly; Italy successfully moved fleets to the Eastern Mediterranean and Ionian Sea, while I positioned my fleets in the Aegean and Albania. 

Our deception of Turkey worked perfectly. Blind to our trap, Turkey wasted their phase attacking Romania, which Russia easily defended with heavy support. Meanwhile, my move from Serbia to Bulgaria successfully bounced Turkey's army from Constantinople, completely jamming their logistics and leaving their units disorganized. 

Russia and Germany continue to be reliable neighbors, respecting our agreed DMZs in Galicia, Bohemia, and Tyrolia. My defensive holds in Vienna and Budapest secured the north while we focus south. 

My strategic position is incredibly strong. For the Fall, I must coordinate with Italy to convoy their Tunis army into Turkish territory (Syria or Smyrna) while I leverage my Aegean fleet and Serbian army to crack Bulgaria or Constantinople. Turkey is surrounded and doomed.
target_goals_post_phase: Execute the Lepanto alliance with Italy to crush Turkey
Position fleets in AEG and ALB for Fall attacks
Maintain peaceful borders with Russia and Germany via DMZs
Disrupt Turkish movements in the Balkans
target_goals_pre_phase: Secure Greece in the Fall to gain a build
Execute the Lepanto alliance with Italy to neutralize Turkey
Maintain peaceful borders with Russia and Germany via DMZs
Keep Turkey deceived about the alliance with Italy until the trap is sprung
Foster the Russo-Turkish war to keep both powers distracted

Austria also built F TRI specifically citing Italian defense, which fits the board: Italy has F ION and now F NAP/F TYS pressure westward, so Austria wants Adriatic/Albanian security without opening a second war. Austria is likely pleased that Russia may have been tricked into moving UKR-GAL and SEV-UKR, which would make RUM easier to take. At the same time, Austria is probably not completely naive: they know Turkey benefits from keeping options open with Russia, but Turkey has supplied useful intelligence and coordinated well so far, making Turkey their best ally for now. Austria's unseen diplomacy likely includes caution toward Italy, probably limited contact with Russia, and some interest in keeping Germany/England friendly as anti-Russian pressure. Strategically, Austria wants to break Russia's southern line, preserve the A/T alliance, avoid provoking Italy, and keep flexibility in the northwest with A VIE and F TRI. The most likely orders are exactly what Austria has repeatedly promised: A SER S A BUL-RUM, A BUD S A BUL-RUM, F GRE H, F TRI-ALB. The remaining uncertainty is A VIE. Since Austria has said its armies are ready to help but specifically only committed SER and BUD, and because VIE cannot influence RUM directly except via GAL, the likeliest practical move is A VIE-GAL to exploit the expected Russian shift and increase pressure on Warsaw/Ukraine.
